calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Suzanne McDonald, via Zoom, for Patricia Quinn, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel of its tentative ruling. Counsel offers testimony in support of her petition and refers to probate code 800 regarding the court's jurisdiction.

After additional discussion, the court confirms its tentative ruling to grant the petition as to the properties that were held as community property and deny the request to characterize the joint tenant properties as community property.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
